INVOKE.COMMENT: ===Get Start Time and set error message for DB logging===

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Do not fail the trxn if the logging to DB fails

INVOKE.COMMENT: !!! Log the start of the processing

BRANCH.COMMENT: !!! set the number of chunks to fetch

MAP.COMMENT: keep track of metric, clean up, and prepare for sort

LOOP.COMMENT: process one customer at a time

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Do not fail the trxn if the logging to DB fails

Values.value: could not be updated in EL. See 'getSheculedCustomerUpdate'.

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Log completion of chunk. Do not fail the trxn if the logging to DB fails

EXIT.COMMENT: with Success if no records were populated

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Do not fail the trxn if the logging to DB fails

INVOKE.COMMENT: Get Current date - End time of transaction

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Do not fail the trxn if the logging to DB fails

INVOKE.COMMENT: !!! Log the successful completion of the processing

MAP.COMMENT: fill in the publish err info

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Do not fail the trxn if the logging to DB fails
